their REST APIs map cleanly onto the existing Forge trait. For Azure DevOps specifically, borrow the capability-flag idea from approach 3 in a lightweight form (a single supports_inline_comments-style check) rather than adopting the full registry refactor, deferring the larger shared-HTTP-layer refactor (approach 2) to a follow-up issue once duplication actually becomes painful across three-plus forges."}
